CustomField.description: The value of Processing_Cycle_Count__c at the last execution that made measurable progress (Components_Analyzed__c increased). Reset to Processing_Cycle_Count__c whenever Components_Analyzed__c increases. Stall condition: Processing_Cycle_Count__c - Last_Progress_Cycle__c >= Stall_Pause_Threshold__c. Persisted on the job record so it survives across Queueable self-chain boundaries. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Last Progress Cycle
